creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: jhale
Date: Thu Feb 15 11:26:55 UTC 2018
New revision: 461880
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/461880

Log:
  Update to 1.4.2 [1]
  Fix LICENSE
  Update WWW

  Plugins are now in a separate port (audio/picard-plugins). They are
  maintained in a separate repository and no longer shipped with the picard
  source.

  PR:		223354 [1]
  Submitted by:	Greg V <greg@unrelenting.technology> [1]

Changes:
  head/audio/picard/Makefile
  head/audio/picard/distinfo
  head/audio/picard/pkg-descr
  head/audio/picard/pkg-plist
